programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Mexico City Jumping - GCL R1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at Campo Marte in Mexico City, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The program includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, where riders earn ranking points toward the season standings. Competition takes place at altitude, impacting horse performance and pace.

programme.desc: H.H. the Father Amir’s Prix 2026 returns on 9–10 January 2026, bringing together top-class Thoroughbred racing across two days of competitive action, featuring a strong international line-up, high-stakes contests, and a standout atmosphere that celebrates elite sport, tradition, and prestige on Qatar’s racing calendar.

programme.title: Race 1 - DTM - Norisring Round
programme.desc: The DTM heads to the Norisring in Nuremberg for two races on one of the championship’s most iconic street circuits. The tight layout, heavy braking zones, and short lap create close battles, where qualifying, race strategy, and precision driving are crucial across both races.

A reunion with the coach who launched his career, a relentless battle against his own body, a deep rift between the club and its fans, clashes between champions, matches with colossal stakes… For better or for worse, throughout his final season in Ligue 1 and right up until the very last second, Dan

programme.title: Olympique Marseille vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
programme.desc: Marseille are unbeaten in their last 12 Ligue 1 games against Lorient, since a 5-3 defeat at the Stade Vélodrome under Marcelo Bielsa in April 2015. Marseille have won each of their last five home games against Lorient in L1, as many as in their first 12.

programme.title: Nice vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
programme.desc: Nice have not won any of their last six Ligue 1 games against Nantes, after winning the previous four. Nice have lost their last two home games against Nantes in Ligue 1, both by a score of 1-2. Both teams have scored in each of their last nine matches at the Allianz Riviera.

With its short layout, heavy braking zones, and limited room for error, drivers will need precision, strong race pace, and clean execution to fight for valuable championship points.

programme.title: Race 2 - DTM - Norisring Round

programme.desc: Al Jawla covers the latest news and stories from sporting events across the planet. Including latest results and latest scores from the most recent games taking place. This daily look at the latest stories provides a fast paced update to sporting events.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Stats - 6/07/26
programme.desc: A fast-paced statistical breakdown of the numbers shaping the FIFA World Cup 2026. Discover the facts, records, and insights behind football's biggest stage.
